PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(YEAR(?end) AS ?year) WHERE {
  ?season wdt:P118 wd:Q9448 ; wdt:P1346 wd:Q9617 ; wdt:P582 ?end .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?end)
LIMIT 1
